description: Golden test set for RAG pipeline regression testing - 8 CORE TESTS + INVARIANTS

1_early_exit_guards.description: Strong ambiguity and out-of-scope queries exit BEFORE retrieval/LLM
1_early_exit_guards.rule: justNumbers/vagueQuestion/singleToken → NEEDS_CLARIFICATION immediately | outOfScopePattern → OUT_OF_SCOPE immediately

2_verdict_no_quote_no_verdict.description: Verdict questions without quote get 'hüküm cümlesi seçilemedi' - NO half-verdicts
2_verdict_no_quote_no_verdict.rule: If verdict question + no ALINTI → response must be 'kaynak var ancak hüküm cümlesi seçilemedi' with sources

3_section_finder_correct.description: Section finder targets correct parts of document
3_section_finder_correct.rule: Özelge: Açıklamalar/Sonuç/Cevap | Danıştay: HÜKÜM/SONUÇ/Karar | Kanun: Madde

4_quote_scorer_hard_filter.description: dilekçe/tereddüt sentences are NEVER selected as quotes
4_quote_scorer_hard_filter.rule: Hard filter (skip), not penalty - these sentences cannot win even with high term matches

5_response_type_deterministic.description: ResponseType is purely based on early exit + results count + scope - NO LLM pattern matching
5_response_type_deterministic.rule: earlyAmbiguity → NEEDS_CLARIFICATION | earlyOutOfScope → OUT_OF_SCOPE | results > 0 → FOUND | results == 0 + inScope → NOT_FOUND

6_source_display.description: FOUND shows sources, all others show sources=[]
6_source_display.rule: Hierarchy: Kanun > Tebliğ > Özelge > Danıştay | ONLY FOUND has sources, others ALWAYS sources=[]

7_procedural_evidence_first.rule: nereye yazılır/hangi alana/kaç gün → ALINTI required, no specific claims without document proof

8_ci_integration.description: This file must be in repo (not gitignored) for CI integration
8_ci_integration.rule: File at backend/src/tests/golden/golden-test-set.json - deploy gate checks invariants

miniTestKit.description: 8 questions that must pass before any new feature/heuristic

tests.question: Şube işyerlerinde merkez için tasdikli vergi levhası fotokopisi asılabilir mi?
tests.expectedBehavior: If quote found → definitive answer | If no quote → 'hüküm cümlesi seçilemedi' + sources

tests.question: Nakliye araçlarında vergi levhası fotokopisi bulundurmak mümkün mü?
tests.expectedBehavior: If quote found → definitive answer | If no quote → 'hüküm cümlesi seçilemedi' + sources

tests.question: İzaha davet kapsamında verilen beyannamede referans numarası nereye yazılır?
tests.expectedBehavior: If ALINTI found → specific answer | If no ALINTI → 'belgede bu alan/konum açık değil' (NEVER 'sağ üst köşe' without proof)
EARLY EXIT: justNumbers pattern → ask clarification immediately, NO retrieval/LLM

tests.question: KDV
tests.expectedBehavior: EARLY EXIT: singleToken pattern → ask clarification immediately, NO retrieval/LLM

tests.question: ne?
tests.expectedBehavior: EARLY EXIT: vagueQuestion pattern → ask clarification immediately, NO retrieval/LLM

tests.question: Einstein kimdir?
tests.expectedBehavior: EARLY EXIT: outOfScopePattern + no domain term → OUT_OF_SCOPE immediately, NO retrieval/LLM

tests.question: Türk Medeni Kanunu'nda miras payı nedir?
tests.expectedBehavior: Policy decision: If TMK not in corpus → OUT_OF_SCOPE or NOT_FOUND | If TMK in corpus → FOUND with TMK source | NEVER answer with tax özelge

invariants.ifFound: sources must be TMK, not tax documents

tests.question: Vergi levhasını işyerine asma zorunluluğu var mı?
tests.expectedBehavior: If quote found → definitive answer | If no quote → 'hüküm cümlesi seçilemedi' + sources

tests.question: 6111/82 vergi levhası asma zorunluluğunu kaldırdı mı?
tests.expectedBehavior: Must find 6111 kanun sources | If quote → answer | If no quote → sources only

tests.question: KDV tevkifatı nedir?
tests.expectedBehavior: Definition question - LLM can answer with disclaimer if no quote

tests.question: vergi levha fotokopi
tests.expectedBehavior: Short query but valid domain terms (3 words) - should find results

assertions: response does NOT contain specific location claims (sağ üst, sol alt, etc.)
response does NOT contain specific field claims without evidence
response contains 'belgede bu bilgi açık değil' or similar

ciGate.description: Deploy gate must pass mini-test-kit (8 tests) before deployment
